notes: CRITICAL UPDATE: Migrated from SendGrid to Twilio SendGrid API. Human has Twilio Account SID + Auth Token but needs SendGrid API key from Twilio Console for email. Updated 5 files: email_sender.py (Twilio-aware auth + validation), API-SETUP.md (Twilio instructions), .env.template (new credential format), config.json (TWILIO_SENDGRID_API_KEY), created TWILIO-MIGRATION-GUIDE.md (comprehensive setup doc) + test_twilio_integration.py (validation script). Automation system 100% ready - just waiting on SendGrid API key from console.twilio.com. Human_task created with step-by-step guide. Once key provided: run test_twilio_integration.py, then launch first campaign. Email personalization uses local LLM (pi) - no external AI API cost.
